login.title: Login
login.description: Sign in or create an account on Boardsesh

login.subtitle: Sign in or create an account to continue

validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.nameTooLong: Name must be less than 100 characters

toasts.verified: Email verified! You can now log in.
toasts.checkEmail: Please check your email to verify your account
toasts.loginAfterCreate: Please log in with your account

messages.Configuration: There is a problem with the server configuration.
messages.AccessDenied: Access denied. You do not have permission to sign in.
messages.Verification: The verification link has expired or is invalid.
messages.OAuthSignin: Error starting the sign-in flow. Please try again.
messages.OAuthCallback: Error completing the sign-in. Please try again.
messages.OAuthCreateAccount: Could not create an account with this provider.
messages.EmailCreateAccount: Could not create an email account.
messages.OAuthAccountNotLinked: This email is already associated with another account. Please sign in using your original method.
messages.SessionRequired: You must be signed in to access this page.

verifyRequest.title: Check your email
verifyRequest.description: We sent you a verification link. Click the link in your email to verify your account.

messages.EmailNotVerified: Please verify your email before signing in.
messages.InvalidToken: The verification link is invalid. Please request a new one.
messages.TokenExpired: The verification link has expired. Please request a new one.
messages.TooManyAttempts: Too many verification attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.

toasts.sent: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.

modal.title: Sign in to keep your progress
modal.description: Your logbook, playlists, and follows stay with your account.
